textByHash.0082559aab5c33f79afb09d87ec0afba63b61cef: No, sorry, this is not evidence. You need to keep searching, I'm afraid.
textByHash.02eabf770254d4195ca9346b1225c392ccd9e706: Well, ogres dislike others apart from their own kind. What you need is some form of proof of friendship, something to trick them into believing you're their friend.
textByHash.02effa306066a8ea15b74eff2b7da9f8d6817e51: No, no. The potion is not complete yet.
textByHash.110e86d3a493c51bccd404aeb45283db91df55c6: The final ingredient is ground bat bones.
textByHash.1255195733cd0f939f996638b39b91e1ae23ee28: We are always in your debt; do come and visit us again.
textByHash.1be51d4a36a125f251f58461482f4afa7c4ce740: Oh dear, oh dear, there must be something, somewhere...
textByHash.1d07b89a2957aa00279dc6ddbc05f5618f5cce97: Take some illumination with you or else it will be dark.
textByHash.1d8d51049429e121f989987883af9e71acc745a6: Magnificent! At last you've brought all the crystals.
textByHash.1f561412d66c37170ac0330e4d9f16dd17c5a4e9: There must be some evidence of what has happened here. Perhaps you could assist me in searching for clues?
textByHash.283d55349fc9d2957cbac39613511ff773ae202a: That's good to hear. We are much closer to fixing the tower now.
textByHash.2af9b6fc361b7c4924a5566c33cb350999c57389: I will tell the guards to let you past - that way, you can just use the ladder to get in and out.
textByHash.2ce3eae338faaee98b91ec8a640b7e749b1813c4: What folks these days don't realise is that if it weren't for us wizards, this entire world would be overrun with every creature you could possibly imagine. And some you couldn't even conceive of!
textByHash.3140ae65a79b55e44df5093be4c56063a77bb17c: Oh my, oh my! What does it all matter in the end, anyway?
textByHash.38145cac0168fdd62c54bd9fd0b4a9da58533a55: Remember all I told you. You must distract the guard somehow. Cave nightshade is what you are looking for - try searching the skavid caves for it.
textByHash.39be3c9af25c15a613d32eceba845254bd49121f: Ah, it's more of that old ogre statue. I'll take this bit too.
textByHash.3ab04bcc7dcce752ce20080656391745e258bc5e: Hello again. Did you find anything of interest?
textByHash.44dc65539fd44bf8f2385eb1b02a667eb22960ac: The Watchtower over here works by the power of magic. An ancient spell designed to ward off ogres that has been in place here for many moons.
textByHash.45c4c090a1f21ddb5f52eb6b1a1ab736830efd80: They inhabit the caves in the Feldip Hills.
textByHash.477eb43178d7f581ba601e48ee4448fab63d9f1a: Well, regardless, I'm sure a bold, brave adventurer such as yourself won't have any problems.
textByHash.4d6d22fcb4aff2ffced297ec31d2db5f882cae08: I've given you a special scroll too - it's a new spell. Read the scroll and you will be able to teleport yourself here.
textByHash.4e28abe471b35a807250d05649bc79624e955707: Hello again. Did the potion work?
textByHash.51d3670c667a80939bfe18cac5d67b8486d2a94f: That is good news. Let me know if you find anything of interest.
textByHash.55ecd898993a4cb9b7530f208e46d4f2d4275c87: A pestle and mortar will more than do the trick.
textByHash.594daa488cceeab3ff9b6ba3184c28e2138a95c2: The crystals! The crystals have been taken!
textByHash.5afcd0215319b1dff4ff2f6bd027b9d1868c2101: Ah, the warrior returns. Have you found a way into Gu'Tanoth yet?
textByHash.5c55c68998b451e5aeb6f427faef6715f761f725: Collect a guam leaf, add jangerberries, then mix in some ground bat bones. You must return it to me before you use it, so that I can empower it with my magic.
textByHash.5c9fd48f0d42b8e865ca0205c5685c95a0d2738c: We try hard to keep this town protected.
textByHash.5f77a0b2d881002a3ab518b9444000e3768424d6: Try searching the surrounding area. If you find anything unusual, bring it here. Try the bushes - I've read enough adventure stories to know that clues get caught in bushes all the time.
textByHash.60592350940bb2e6f4d7637415c86abc1a0e242a: You should try looking through some of the caves.
textByHash.60f4118dadf8b47f8c3fd8b42d1447c415aa0f84: I imagine you've stored it somewhere. Go and see where you might have put it.
textByHash.62d75a57fee2cdfc43bd07adbcf078057451b97f: When you have mixed the potion correctly, then I can empower the potion with magic and the ogre shamans can be destroyed.
textByHash.6634105ac60c561bd1db043f5d212e2fed53f54c: The exact knowledge of the spell is lost to us now, but the essence of the spell has been infused into four powering crystals that keep the tower protected from the hordes in the Feldips.
textByHash.6b239e380927855ff17166c65a746a349a4be2d8: Perhaps this quest is too hard for you?
textByHash.6c18616998156a77cc5ae81c45c0a8a5f8e08b3b: Good, hand it over to me.
textByHash.6d98c6589e3432d0a2ca1bb20fe82644c32d6ba7: You'll need some way to make the guards let you in.
textByHash.70381ba0d17700a457be63f9be97b2760d37f5e1: That's typical, nowadays. It's left to us wizards to do all the work.
textByHash.71696f37339efd5715b4e308cb468176e3364883: Put the crystals on the pillars there and throw the lever to activate the system.
textByHash.72eb485d750a212c002e7975c12fea263ed696ba: Hello again. How do you fare?
textByHash.75d2b008589a41ec7007d78ed244122c4c0f54fb: Ho, ho, ho! A comedian to the finish. There it is, in your backpack!
textByHash.7b8f03d56afddf0b218ab208a4b8952560fc31a7: Yes I could do with an extra pair of eyes here.
textByHash.7ba813d9d4ec2dc72d888365cc856f45de5923fa: That's great news; let me infuse it with magic...
textByHash.80ad2da21114adeccdb3d1dae4c83804cd7f3e5d: Oh no. Well, you had better go back there, then!
textByHash.8169ba4a2d415a2a1c728f76d099065366a695fb: You could start by checking out the ogre settlements around here. Tribal ogres often dislike their neighbours... In the meantime, I'll throw those fingernails out for you.
textByHash.82500eede7c17e638c7a6b955c31f93110c336a4: The Watchtower here works by the power of magic. An ancient spell designed to ward off ogres that has been in place here for many moons.
textByHash.834453a1a01da4ee2dc641614b6742539aafd676: Talk to them face to face and don't show any fear. Make sure you are rested and well fed, and fight the good fight!
textByHash.83e09625d9fcf5d2aa9a2f8acce81db1f78a92ca: Oh dear, oh dear. Darn and drat!
textByHash.8586ce4a4027410f8d2148fa6c95647ea780ea31: Be very careful how you mix it as it is extremely volatile. Mixing ingredients of this type in the wrong order can cause explosions!
textByHash.86c73bd9edec1e666ef359931f164cf91d2e2323: Well, if you ever want to make friends with an ogre, this is the item to have! Now I'll try to assemble it...
textByHash.86d4b9e364ec127611f93c0f65004229332fabe2: Didn't you know that the ogres keep blue dragons as pets and for magical ingredients?
textByHash.8890869819acc7751f2caa4bfec4b582990ac743: But how can we do that when the Watchtower isn't working?
textByHash.8fbd3220238de55f2011a030867d5f45331e21fe: Yes indeed, let me see, what was it again...
textByHash.90a08b5603b33ac54ac1b071b4a840766c1f90f9: I hope you've been brushing up Herblore and Magic? I must warn you, only experienced magicians can use the potion. It is too dangerous in the hands of the unskilled.
textByHash.90a55f0a629c948c14501822b515878b15f5002a: Of course! They belong to a skavid!
textByHash.965cb9f66e5921d593d316be520af000eb7b6b64: You need to be fearless and gain entrance to Gu'Tanoth, the city of the ogres, then find out how to navigate the caves.
textByHash.a0d3a188c3e9e3b1baf668f36f9921e36c783537: What? Lost the relic? How careless! It's a good job I copied its design, then! You can take this copy instead - it's just as good.
textByHash.a1a3856991a1248a07f2b8e5304b80b7557f8dd7: You will need a guam leaf. That goes into the mix first.
textByHash.a319bc7e59b956a9c1f36dc0a67e2c01d0c2271c: That is because of their magical powers. We must fight them with their own methods; do not speak to them! I suggest a potion...
textByHash.a45406fd47f2668a66ce943b2c9fbc869ce8fc6c: How are you doing with the ogres?
textByHash.a515a93664606ea6b3e6f5f89a0c13752fb8898a: My, my. A wordsmith as well as a hero.
textByHash.a6a6e93d9b39a6b267a2189e675ccd7c9893f19c: And don't forget to look out for the dragons!
textByHash.a6b6b2223fe477ba2651ca4833236e1909c334d2: A servant race to the ogres: grey, depressed-looking creatures, always losing nails, teeth and hair!
textByHash.af12cfae6c9a1afda57d433fe5cfc3dfe11bf806: Ogres are nasty creatures, yes. Only a strong warrior, and a clever one at that, can get the better of them.
textByHash.afcadbabfe16da44d67e23dafc1865dc1bb524ee: Greetings, friend. I trust all is well with you? Yanille is safe at last!
textByHash.afdd62584f479ca9baa433d2ceb20e6ca99ae3e3: Ho, ho, ho! A comedian to the finish! There it is, in your backpack!
textByHash.b2f0de2dc6e7b1d832dcf3bb279f7011acb4890c: Yes, it will be well guarded. Hmmm, let me see...
textByHash.b36f2ee8cbe71f932417b883f456f4fa4ae7cf8d: Oh, really? If you got it from someone, maybe they'll have found it again. Otherwise, go and search the place where you got it in the first place.
textByHash.b398e714499f2f0b0f01e2afe8c2db6099017ac8: This herb is very poisonous, however, so handle it with care. Also, be on your guard in that cave. Who knows what monsters may be in that awful place...
textByHash.b5f8af8905696639e0be0666b49f98f8afe51558: Ah yes, I gather some ogres are allergic to certain herbs. Now what was it? It had white berries and blue leaves....
textByHash.b75fc187202e630bed2682e8c3e4b819d9800408: It's no good searching the caves. Well, not yet, anyway.
textByHash.bafc87377fd90ddd14fbfc7ad867d72bcb58086a: Ah, it's part of an old ogre statue. I'll take that off you - it might come in handy if I can fix it up.
textByHash.bb97775242310bd45d62faad3e8ccb435df639f7: I can't let you use this now, it's just too dangerous. I'd better take it from you before you injure yourself.
textByHash.c0dcf124625b8152966de91b8f1f006ebfd57fc4: Well what are you doing here?
textByHash.c5138c3c13451832a741cb7044c9596a57a1818b: Oh, deary me! Well, there's nothing I can do about it. You will have to go back to them, I'm afraid.
textByHash.c6edb948b0dbc30812d47297961a150d5589d0ac: They are deep and complex. The only way you will navigate the caves is to have a map or something.
textByHash.ca0e52ca22743e30fbb1b1f9542615e7cf44b8db: Good, good! I will expect the crystals back shortly then...
textByHash.cc8768c904b94925584d730c16b0b6de20b1393a: Well, if you can cast Bones to Bananas, or any spells beyond that, you should be alright.
textByHash.ccc72d1d945bd892025cde184229b76c105c9b65: You will need to add those after the guam leaf has gone in, but before the final ingredient.
textByHash.cd37aac3dfecbe5476a2edc94c19b39e1980517e: Which shouldn't be too hard, considering their intelligence.
textByHash.cf0cd55b0f3027f879cf590891f2c08c67d92d89: It may be that the ogres have one...
textByHash.d1bcbc92cc7eb6ee5e9e0d178d98435f25188350: Here it is - a dangerous substance. I must remind you that this potion can only be used if your Magic level is high enough.
textByHash.d50b175a45efa68436d2a14be01e485f8fc53c65: Marvellous! It works! The town will now be safe. Take these coins as a token of my gratitude. Also, let me improve your Magic level.
textByHash.d78d4f6dc4f7a8e6def90c793d30ee029c276826: I am sure the cave holds the final crystal. Look for the source of the shamans' power.
textByHash.d8c863a410639e63a2d06a0bd33af017ded2ad7d: Now the shield generator can be activated and, once again, Yanille will be safe from the threat of the ogres.
textByHash.dd47d6a1e9598a4d2769032aa65258f95157f2e3: You need a map of some kind... I bet one of the ogres has one.
textByHash.dd636425579c70e84e161143e28121c49a8b7e36: Have you gone mad? I can see you have it with you!
textByHash.ded9cc89190db9c6625b996ecc3d46da991a5776: Who are you? Are you one of the new guards?
textByHash.def298b033c8254a0b0bc365140ea484a8167953: More quests? No, indeed, adventurer. You have done us a great service, already.
textByHash.e0e7a2e604559bb14f38e9870a39b70d40174a96: Try searching the surrounding area. If you find anything unusual, bring it here. Try the bushes - I've read enough adventure stoies to know that clues get caught in bushes all the time.
textByHash.e59c4d66a0a2d217df2cced308cbbf4b977a7e16: Yes, I'm sure you will... Good luck!
textByHash.e9c6546d80f2b71dc8b1a7a59e3318297d6de546: The system is not activated yet. Throw the switch to start it.
textByHash.ec223f01fef2422814e222887f10a9b2b5702e51: They normally keep to themselves, though. It's unusual for them to venture from their caves.
textByHash.ee4c4df7a77e9643c2ca7201f64f22506d483922: Didn't you know that the ogres keep blue dragons as pets and for magical ingredients
textByHash.fd6a2341cba98c56ae07bc7906bd63c252be79f7: Yes, yes! Do I have to repeat myself?
textByHash.fe5238cbfd4fbafe1be660bf10a371b849f656c5: It looks like you've brought me all the pieces of the relic. It is as I thought - a statue symbolising an ogre warrior of old.
